features: All our botanical fragrances are made with nature-inspired ingredients, carefully selected in a way that respects our planet
Enjoy the scent of jasmine and cinnamon leaf from Sri Lanka
Fragrance infused with natural essential oils
Natural Origin Wax Candle with Metal Free Wick
description: Product Description All Botanica by Air Wick fragrances are infused with natural essential oils and free of phthalates, acetone and dyes. Our fragrances are made with natural exotic fragrance ingredients, carefully selected in a responsible way that respects our planet. Botanica candles last up to 90 hours Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not leave burning unattended. Extinguish the candle when leaving the room or before falling asleep. Properly remove the remnants of wax after use.
